name: Healthy Competition: Product Marketing | Competitive Intelligence | Strategy
description:
This show has one simple goal: help you stand out and win in B2B tech. So in each episode, we interview founders, investors, and industry leaders to walk us through their businesses, differentiators, and how they stay on top of their markets + competitors.
 
www.healthycompetition.co

recent_episodes.title: Special Announcement 💚
recent_episodes.description: Hi! It's been a while. Tune in to hear an important update about the future of Healthy Competition :-)

recent_episodes.title: April Dunford: Nailing Competitive Positioning
recent_episodes.description:
April Dunford is the world's leading expert on positioning for B2B tech companies and the author of 'Obviously Awesome' as well as the newly released 'Sales Pitch.'


We focused on how competitive intel and positioning intersect in business:

- bashing "approaches," not competitors

- the importance of positioning your competitors

- when to mention competitors (and when to leave them be)

- why you shouldn't be scared of talking about competitors

score_reason: Covers product marketing and strategy for B2B tech with guest interviews, though focus on competitive intelligence may not perfectly align with Andreas's AI/traditional industry angle.

key_themes: Competitive positioning and differentiation in B2B tech
AI as a tool for competitive advantage and GTM strategy
Building and scaling companies (startups to exits)
Customer intelligence and evidence-based decision making
Career development and leadership in product marketing
enrichment.relevant_episode: Getting Ahead as a Product Marketer With AI w/ Jess Petrella — Andreas's practical AI applications for traditional industries directly complement the show's focus on using AI as a competitive advantage, but from a non-tech founder's perspective.
enrichment.coverage_gap: How traditional, non-tech industries (food, agriculture, manufacturing) can use competitive intelligence and AI to outcompete tech-native competitors — the show focuses exclusively on B2B SaaS and tech companies.
enrichment.suggested_hook: The guy who built Canada's largest food marketing agency just taught agricultural commodity boards to out-compete Silicon Valley with AI—here's what traditional industries know about winning that B2B tech companies are missing.
